| Time  | Topic                                                                                         |
|-------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 8:00  | [Welcome](workshop/01-welcome.qmd) + [Basic building blocks](workshop/02-building_blocks.qmd) |
| 8:20  | [Your first application — inputs](workshop/03-first_app.qmd)                                  |
| 8:35  | [Your first application — outputs](workshop/03-first_app.qmd)                                 |
| 8:50  | ☕ Break                                                                                       |
| 9:00  | [Shiny reactivity](workshop/04-reactivity.qmd)                                                |
| 9:15  | [A more complex application](workshop/05-complex_app.qmd)                                     |
| 9:50  | ☕ Break                                                                                       |
| 10:00 | [Introduction to Shiny modules](workshop/06-modules_intro.qmd)                                |
| 10:15 | [Refactor your app into a module](workshop/07-modules_refactor.qmd)                           |
| 10:30 | [Reuse your Shiny module](workshop/08-modules_compose.qmd)                                    |
| 10:50 | ☕ Break                                                                                       |
| 11:00 | [Testing](workshop/09-testing.qmd) your shiny apps with playwright                            |
| 11:30 | [Deploying your application](workshop/10-deploy.qmd)                                          |
| 11:50 | [Wrap up](workshop/11-wrap_up.qmd)                                                            |
| 12:00 | Finish                                                                                        |
